text.title: Inference Cost Unit Economics Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals from inputs to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for inference-cost-unit-economics.

decision-tree.root-question: Is per-feature cost attribution + outcome definition in place?

conclusion.verdict: BLOCK — agree on success metric per feature
FLAG — investigate retry policy before optimising prompt
ACTION — propose cost-cut or price-up options
skip — preconditions in Applies-If not met

text.example: preconditions met → first branch matches → conclusion ref resolves to a rule in 01-core-rules.xml.
